BDI_II.responses: {"Q0":"0. I do not feel sad.","Q1":"0. I am not discouraged about my future.","Q2":"0. I do not feel like a failure.","Q3":"0. I get as much pleasure as I ever did from the things I enjoy.","Q4":"1. I feel guilty over many things I have done or should have done.","Q5":"1. I feel I may be punished.","Q6":"1. I have lost confidence in myself.","Q7":"1. I am more critical of myself than I used to be.","Q8":"0. I don't have any thoughts of killing myself.","Q9":"0. I don't cry anymore than I used to.","Q10":"1. I feel more restless or wound up than usual.","Q11":"0. I have not lost interest in other people or activities.","Q12":"2. I have much greater difficulty in making decisions than I used to.","Q13":"0. Don't select this option.","Q14":"0. I do not feel I am worthless.","Q15":"0. I have as much energy as ever.","Q16":"1+. I sleep somewhat more than usual.","Q17":"0. I am no more irritable than usual.","Q18":"1+. My appetite is somewhat greater than usual.","Q19":"0. I can concentrate as well as ever.","Q20":"0.
